overall.description: A slow boat journey through a foggy harbor in a video game environment. The camera passes a small white boat and wooden dock structures while approaching a distant platform, with a lighthouse visible through the mist on the forested shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy harbor channel with moored boat and floating docks

events.description: blue floating platforms on right recede and exit view

agents.ego_description: piloting a small watercraft slowly forward through the foggy harbor, approaching a white boat moored ahead

entered.detail: small white motorboat with cabin floating in the foreground center
blue rectangular floating dock sections moored on the right side
weathered wooden dock buildings with stairs and railings on the right shore
tall industrial crane structure rising above the dock buildings
white lighthouse tower atop a forested hill in the distant background
tree-covered hillside surrounding the lighthouse base
small wooden platform or houseboat floating in the middle of the harbor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy harbor with a small white boat floating ahead. Blue floating docks are visible on the right near wooden dock structures and a tall crane. The camera moves slowly forward on the water toward a distant platform, with a lighthouse barely visible through the mist on the forested shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: harbor channel passing industrial dock structures

events.description: foreground white boat passes out of frame to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the channel, passing the moored boat and moving alongside the wooden dock structures

segments.scene_description: Having passed the foreground boat, the camera continues moving forward along the industrial dock. The wooden dock buildings and crane are now closer on the right side, while the distant center platform becomes more defined as the camera approaches it through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: open water approaching central harbor platform

events.description: dock structures recede to the background, opening into wider harbor space

agents.ego_description: moving into open water toward the central platform, with the dock now behind and to the right

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into more open water as the dock structures recede behind. The small center platform is now much closer and more detailed, while the lighthouse remains a constant presence through the fog on the distant forested shore.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy harbor that transitions from a cluttered industrial waterfront to an open expanse of water. It begins by gliding toward a small white boat, passing blue floating docks and a tall crane positioned beside wooden structures on the right. As the camera moves forward, these industrial elements draw closer before receding into the background, while the distant center platform gradually becomes more defined through the mist. The scene then opens into a wider stretch of water, bringing the detailed platform into clear view while the lighthouse remains a constant, ghostly presence on the forested shore.
